dialogues.text: dude. you look genuinely terrible, and I mean that with love. are you sleeping at all? like at all? anyway — and I hate that there's an anyway — can you spot me twenty?
dialogues.yes_response: you're the best, seriously, top three people alive. also please drink some water, you look like a photograph of yourself.
dialogues.no_response: no worries man, I'll ask somebody else. but the sleep thing stands. that wasn't a setup for the twenty, I actually mean it.

dialogues.text: okay. I know you've got a lot going on right now. I can tell, I'm not blind. I respect it, I'm not going to dig into it. but also, in a small voice, twenty?
dialogues.yes_response: legend. and hey — I'm here if you ever want to actually talk. I know I don't say that in a way that sounds real, but it is.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's cool, honestly. you've got enough stacked on you. I'll sort the twenty. don't even think about it.

dialogues.text: I feel like we haven't actually hung out in forever. like properly, not just crossing paths. I miss you, man, that's a real sentence I'm saying. also I need twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: okay but we're actually hanging out this week. I'm putting it in the phone. I mean it this time, for real.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's fine, it's fine. we'll figure it out when things calm down for you. they will. they have to.

dialogues.text: remember when you used to call me back? same day, even? god, we were so young. anyway I'm holding that over you for exactly twenty bucks.
dialogues.yes_response: I'm kidding. mostly. like seventy percent kidding. not about the twenty though, that part was sincere.
dialogues.no_response: okay, fair, that's fair. I'm still kidding. probably. the percentages are getting away from me.

dialogues.text: so I heard something second-hand and I told myself I wasn't going to bring it up and here I am bringing it up like an idiot — are you okay? like actually okay? twenty, and you can ignore the rest.
dialogues.yes_response: okay. okay, I'm not going to push on it. I just — I worry about you, man. that's allowed, right. I'm allowed.
dialogues.no_response: no, I get it, I do. just. I'm around. you know that, right? like you actually know it?

dialogues.text: you look like you haven't eaten today. have you eaten today? don't answer that, I can see the answer. give me twenty and I'll turn it into a sandwich for you, this is a good deal.
dialogues.yes_response: okay we're getting food right now, that's non-negotiable, I'm not asking. you need it, look at you.
dialogues.no_response: okay but at least eat something later, I'm serious, I'll text you about it and everything. you look rough, man.

dialogues.text: you're one of like three people I actually like. genuinely like, not just tolerate from history. I hope you know where you rank. also, smaller note, twenty.
dialogues.yes_response: I mean it, the ranking thing. okay come on, let's go do something, I'm bored and you look like you could use a distraction.
dialogues.no_response: you know the first part still stands though, right? the ranking? okay, okay, I'll find someone else for the twenty.

dialogues.text: twenty, quick, I can't get into it right now but I'll explain the whole thing later and you'll totally get it and probably laugh. trust the process.
dialogues.yes_response: okay I love you, don't make it weird, thank you, the process thanks you, everyone thanks you.
dialogues.no_response: okay that's fair, honestly, I wouldn't explain it either if I were standing where you're standing. no notes.

dialogues.text: I know today's been a lot. I can read it right off your face, you've never been able to hide anything from me. I'm not going to ask. just twenty, and a fist bump if you've got one in you.
dialogues.yes_response: thank you, man. I'm here if you need anything, and yeah I know I'm literally asking you for money right now, but I still mean it.
dialogues.no_response: nah it's all good. hey — you good though? like under the face, are you good? you can tell me you're not.

dialogues.text: you're honestly the only person I can ask, and not just for the money. I don't — I don't want to lose track of you, man. that's the actual thing. twenty bucks, and don't disappear.
dialogues.yes_response: hey. when this is all over — whatever this even is — we're getting drinks and you're telling me everything. promise me that.
dialogues.no_response: I'll figure the twenty out. but hey, the rest of it, I mean it. don't disappear on me. I'd notice. I'd really notice.
